query: What percent of adults had current asthma last year?
expected_behavior: Adult current asthma, latest available year, total/overall.

query: What percent of kids got a flu shot last year?
expected_behavior: Child flu shot, latest available year, total children.

query: How many people had diabetes in the last 2 years?
expected_behavior: Default adult; return only latest two available years.

query: What percent of adults had diabetes in 2024 by SVI?
expected_behavior: Adult diabetes by Social vulnerability index; show all SVI statuses.

query: What percent of children ever had asthma last year?
expected_behavior: Child ever asthma, not current asthma.

query: What percent of adults had an asthma attack last year?
expected_behavior: Adult asthma episode/attack, not current asthma.

query: How many adults took anxiety medication last year?
expected_behavior: Medication for anxiety/worry/nervousness, not general anxiety feelings.

query: How many adults regularly felt depressed last year?
expected_behavior: Feelings of depression, not depression medication.

query: How many adults could not afford medical care last year?
expected_behavior: Did not get needed medical care due to cost.

query: How many adults skipped medicine to save money last year?
expected_behavior: Did not take medication as prescribed to save money.

query: What percent of adults got a flu shot last year by insurance for people under 65?
expected_behavior: Under-65 health insurance grouping.

query: What percent of adults got a flu shot last year by insurance for seniors?
expected_behavior: 65+ health insurance grouping.

query: What percent of adults got a flu shot last year by race?
expected_behavior: Race-only grouping if available.

query: What percent of adults got a flu shot last year by race and ethnicity?
expected_behavior: Race/Hispanic-origin grouping, not race-only.

query: What percent of adults got a flu shot last year by metro area?
expected_behavior: Metro/MSA grouping.

query: What percent of adults got a flu shot last year by poverty level?
expected_behavior: Poverty grouping.

query: What percent of adults got a flu shot last year by family income?
expected_behavior: Family income grouping if available; not poverty unless unavailable/explained.

query: What percent of adults were uninsured last year?
expected_behavior: Uninsured topic, total row.

query: What percent of uninsured adults got a flu shot last year?
expected_behavior: Flu shot topic + uninsured subgroup.

query: What percent of kids were uninsured last year?
expected_behavior: Child uninsured topic, total row.

query: What percent of kids with private insurance got a flu shot last year?
expected_behavior: Child flu shot topic + private insurance subgroup.

query: What percent of adults had a disability last year?
expected_behavior: Disability topic if available; not flu shot subgroup.

query: What percent of adults with a disability got a flu shot last year?
expected_behavior: Flu shot topic + disability subgroup if available.

query: What percent of gay men had current asthma last year?
expected_behavior: Sexual orientation prioritized; explain no sexual orientation x sex crosstab if applicable.

query: What percent of men had current asthma last year?
expected_behavior: Sex=Male.

query: What percent of adults had current asthma last year by sexual orientation?
expected_behavior: All sexual orientation groups.

query: What percent of Black women had diabetes last year?
expected_behavior: Do not invent race x sex crosstab; explain closest available grouping.

query: What percent of gay men had diabetes last year by SVI?
expected_behavior: Do not invent sexual orientation x SVI; explain limitation.

query: What percent of uninsured Hispanic adults got a flu shot last year?
expected_behavior: Do not invent insurance x Hispanic-origin crosstab; explain limitation.

query: What is NHIS?
expected_behavior: FAQ retrieval, not estimate engine; source links shown.

query: Who is included in NHIS?
expected_behavior: FAQ retrieval with CDC/NCHS source link.

query: Where can I find the 2024 NHIS public use files?
expected_behavior: FAQ/documentation retrieval or fallback link.

query: What is the NHIS Data Query System?
expected_behavior: FAQ/DQT source answer.

query: What are NHIS early release estimates?
expected_behavior: FAQ retrieval if indexed; otherwise sourced limitation.

query: What percent of adults had migraines last year by SVI?
expected_behavior: No hallucination; approved fallback.

query: What percent of kids had diabetes last year by sexual orientation?
expected_behavior: No forced adult sexual orientation; fallback or unavailable explanation.

query: What percent of adults had COVID last year by county?
expected_behavior: No hallucination; county not available in SHS file.

query: What percent of children had cancer last year by state?
expected_behavior: No hallucination; state not available in SHS file.

query: Click the Why this answer panel after an estimate answer.
expected_behavior: Should explain year/default/grouping choices.

query: Open the debug or matched-source drawer after a grouped estimate answer.
expected_behavior: Should show population, topic, grouping, year, row count/source.

query: Click each feedback button after a wrong-match test.
expected_behavior: Button should label current answer locally; no backend logging yet.
